ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being ranked */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the competition */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the team */,
  "competition" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "rank_change" INTEGER /* Change in rank compared to the previous year */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the competition */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the competition */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws in the competition */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses in the competition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_competition FOREIGN KEY ("competition") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitions" (
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competition */,
  "competition_name" TEXT /* Name of the competition */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the competition started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the competition ended */,
  "organizing_body" TEXT /* Organizing body for the competition */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* How often the competition is held */,
  "current_champion" INTEGER /* Team ID of the current champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in kg */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "competition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the competition the match is part of */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_competition_id FOREIGN KEY ("competition_id") REFERENCES competitions ("competition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of playing surface */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Typical weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach leads */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach started with the team */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the coach left the team (null if current) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic is for */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
